component.author: OWASP Foundation
component.name: cyclonedx-maven-plugin
component.description: CycloneDX Maven plugin

component.name: ike-maven-plugin-support
component.description: Shared library for IKE Maven plugins: goal identifier interface, base Mojo with per-goal report writing, self-healing gitignore, and interactive parameter resolution helpers.

component.name: ike-workspace-model
component.description: Typed model for workspace.yaml manifests with graph algorithms (topological sort, cascade analysis, cycle detection) and version manipulation utilities. Foundation for ike-maven-plugin workspace goals.

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.name: maven-support
component.description: Provides the Maven 4 Model Support

component.name: maven-api-metadata
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable Repository Metadata model.

component.name: maven-xml
component.description: Provides the implementation classes for the Maven XML

component.name: woodstox-core
component.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

component.name: stax2-api
component.description: Stax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.

component.name: maven-api-core
component.description: Maven 4 API - Maven Core API

component.name: maven-api-annotations
component.description: Maven 4 API - Java meta annotations.

component.name: maven-api-model
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable Model for Maven POM (Project Object Model).

component.name: maven-api-settings
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable Settings model.

component.name: maven-api-toolchain
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable Toolchain model.

component.name: maven-api-xml
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable XML.

component.name: maven-api-di
component.description: Maven 4 API - Dependency Injection

component.name: maven-api-plugin
component.description: Maven 4 API - Immutable Plugin model.

component.name: rewrite-xml
component.description: Eliminate tech-debt. Automatically.

component.name: rewrite-core
component.description: Eliminate tech-debt. Automatically.

component.name: jgit
component.description: Fork of jgit to maintain Java 8 compatibility

component.name: JavaEWAH
component.description: The bit array data structure is implemented in Java as the BitSet class. Unfortunately, this fails to scale without compression. JavaEWAH is a word-aligned compressed variant of the Java bitset class. It uses a 64-bit run-length encoding (RLE) compression scheme. The goal of word-aligned compression is not to achieve the best compression, but rather to improve query processing time. Hence, we try to save CPU cycles, maybe at the expense of storage. However, the EWAH scheme we implemented is always more efficient storage-wise than an uncompressed bitmap (implemented in Java as the BitSet class). Unlike some alternatives, javaewah does not rely on a patented scheme.

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-dataformat-smile
component.description: Support for reading and writing Smile ("binary JSON") encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

component.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
component.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

component.name: jspecify
component.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

component.name: java-object-diff
component.description: Fork of object differ with the logging removed

component.name: gizmo
component.description: A bytecode generation library.

component.name: asm
component.description: ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-util
component.description: Utilities for ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-tree
component.description: Tree API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-analysis
component.description: Static code analysis API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: jandex
component.description: Parent POM for JBoss projects. Provides default project build configuration.

component.name: jna-platform
component.description: Java Native Access Platform

component.name: jna
component.description: Java Native Access

component.name: univocity-parsers
component.description: univocity's open source parsers for processing different text formats using a consistent API

component.name: classgraph
component.description: The uber-fast, ultra-lightweight classpath and module scanner for JVM languages.

component.name: jsonrpc
component.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 client and server library

component.publisher: Joe Walnes, Henri Tremblay, Leonardo Mesquita
component.name: objenesis
component.description: A library for instantiating Java objects

component.name: annotations
component.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: antlr4-runtime
component.description: The ANTLR 4 Runtime

component.name: caffeine
component.description: A high performance caching library

component.name: checker-qual
component.description: checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmer writes to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.

component.name: error_prone_annotations
component.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

component.name: micrometer-core
component.description: Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

component.name: HdrHistogram
component.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

component.name: LatencyUtils
component.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.

component.name: commons-text
component.description: Apache Commons Text is a set of utility functions and reusable components for processing and manipulating text in a Java environment.

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description:
Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.
The code is tested using the latest revision of the JDK for supported LTS releases: 8, 11, 17, 21 and 25 currently. See https://github.com/apache/commons-lang/blob/master/.github/workflows/maven.yml
Please ensure your build environment is up-to-date and kindly report any build issues.
